admissibility: Per the V2.1 starter_identity_policy, no predictive-skill claim involving the pitcher domain is admissible while this unresolved training-serving skew exists.
conclusion: The historical pitcher domain is 100% POSTGAME actual-starter attributed. Training-serving starter parity CANNOT be established from committed data.

cutoff_known_probable_starter_census.basis: the committed 2015-2024 artifacts contain NO pre-cutoff probable-starter snapshot; the forward probable-starter capture system runs only live/forward, so historical cutoff-known probable starters do not exist in-repo

effect_on_v2_1_result: Reinforces PREDICTIVE SKILL NOT ESTABLISHED: pitcher-inclusive ablations carry an explicit inadmissibility flag; no admissible skill claim is possible from committed data.
question: For committed historical 2015-2024 games, is the cutoff-known probable starter available and does it match the actual starter?

resolution_options_and_status.rebuild_with_cutoff_known_probable_start: requires point-in-time historical probable-starter announcements with timestamps, absent from committed artifacts (out of scope without a new admitted source)
resolution_options_and_status.restrict_to_confirmed_starter_scoring: not possible historically (no confirmed pregame starter in committed data)
